Transferred Funds; Availability for Expenditure, , provided that all unexpended receipts, notwithstanding any limitations contained in the second proviso of , , derived from the sale of labor supply centers, labor homes, labor camps, and facilities, and all other unexpended balances of funds available for the maintenance, operation, and liquidation of the properties transferred and for the administrative expenses of transfer were transferred to the Public Housing Administration, to be available until expended, in accordance with the provisions of this chapter.Act Apr. 20, 1950, ch. 94, title II, § 205(c)64 Stat. 73act May 26, 1947, ch. 82, title I61 Stat. 109
